name: jwsync-tests
description: Static + JSDOM runtime + regression tests for jwsync.org. Run `npm install` once, then `npm test`.

scripts.test: node 01_static.js && node 02_runtime.js && node 03_regression.js && node 04_lazy_load.js && node 05_post_merge.js && node 06_conflict_review.js && node 07_library_wrapped.js && node 08_pre_merge_preview.js && node 09_scheduled_sync.js && node 10_mobile_polish.js
